headline: Cannabis Pharmaceuticals Business Research Report 2026: An $111.1 Billion Market by 2032 from $4.7 Billion in 2025 Featuring AbbVie, Aphria, Aurora Cannabis, Bausch Health, and Canopy Growth
summary: The cannabis pharmaceuticals market is poised for significant growth due to rising medical cannabis legalization, increasing R&D investment, and demand for alternative treatments. Key opportunities include advancements in cannabinoid research, therapeutic applications in chronic pain, neurological disorders, and mental health conditions, and the development of cannabis-based formulations driven by regulatory approvals and evolving healthcare systems.
